# Pull Request

## What changed

- Summarize changes to hydrometric data or features of the data management workflows

## Why

- Provide a brief justification for the proposed changes
- Reference any related issues (e.g., Closes #123)

## Type of change

- [ ] Data correction or update
- [ ] New station or data source added
- [ ] Feature or workflow improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Metadata refinement

## Data changes

- [ ] No data changes (documentation or code only)
- [ ] Data added or updated
- [ ] Data removed or corrected

If data changes are made:
- [ ] Data validation performed (outliers, missing values, ranges)
- [ ] Quality control procedures followed
- [ ] Data sources and collection methods verified
- [ ] Affected analyses documented

## Quality assurance

- [ ] Metadata complete and accurate
- [ ] Units and parameters clearly documented
- [ ] Data sources and collection methods cited
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing workflows

## Related issues

Closes #
Related to #

## Additional context

*Add any other context about the PR here*

---

**Before submitting, please ensure:**
- [ ] You've tested your changes locally
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] You've referenced related issues
- [ ] No sensitive data is included
- [ ] Code/data follows project style guide
